runTitle: Production broad QA - AI domain boundary Phase 3 reference refresh blocked by console/date regressions
coveredSurfaces: landing render with version badge on production v8.11.24
/login render with guest PIN entry and privacy link
guest PIN login and system-start countdown to /dashboard
dashboard summary render with total 18 / online 16 / warning 1 / risk 1 / offline 0
server detail modal auto-focus via serverId query and 3-tab switch (종합 상황 / 성능 분석 / 로그 & 네트워크)
AI fullscreen workspace render on production v8.11.24
AI response mode toggle visibility (오토 / Thinking)
supported domain query in Thinking mode returns grounded summary without disclaimer
general off-domain weather query returns disclaimer and web-backed analysis basis in Auto mode
entertainment off-domain query returns disclaimer and general-response analysis basis in Auto mode
/api/version 200 on production with version 8.11.24 / nextjs 16.1.6 / environment production
skippedSurfaces: AI sidebar open/close on dashboard shell
Analyst advanced forecast and drilldown flow

expertAssessments.rationale: Core routes, guest session bootstrap, dashboard modal tabs, and AI domain-boundary conversations were validated in one production browser session.
Domain boundary policy itself worked, but the weather query answered a 2026-04-21 production prompt with a stale absolute date (2023-11-02), so off-domain freshness grounding is still unreliable.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Prevent relative-date prompts like 오늘 from surfacing stale cached dates on off-domain web-backed answers.

expertAssessments.rationale: The previous next/font preload warning regression is gone, but a new repeated production chunk init TypeError now appears across landing/login/privacy/dashboard/ai routes, so console cleanliness is still not broad-reference clean.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Identify and remove the production _next chunk init error before promoting this run as the new broad reference.

expertAssessments.rationale: Deployment dpl_3cutqnX7vMtm5qAuxzgnAnVULEmk remained READY and /api/health + /api/version stayed healthy on production v8.11.24.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive succeeded; current period effective usage 13.0408 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected spike observed.

pendingImprovements.title: Clear repeated production chunk init console error across core routes
pendingImprovements.note: Broad reference refresh is blocked because landing/login/privacy/dashboard/ai-assistant all surface TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'init') from the same production chunk.

pendingImprovements.title: Stop stale absolute dates in off-domain relative-date answers
pendingImprovements.note: The production weather query 서울 오늘 날씨 알려줘 returned disclaimer + web-backed path, but still stated 2023년 11월 2일 on a 2026-04-21 run.

notes: Compared with QA-20260415-0291, landing/login/privacy/dashboard core stayed functionally green and the previous next/font preload warning regression no longer reproduced.
Guest PIN login worked through the production modal flow with PIN 4231, and system start redirected to /dashboard successfully.
Dashboard broad core snapshot during the run: total 18, online 16, warning 1, risk 1, offline 0; system resources 46/51/39.

AI domain boundary policy behaved as intended at the UX level: supported domain query in Thinking mode stayed grounded without disclaimer, while weather and 운세 prompts showed the general-information disclaimer in Auto mode.

The broad run cannot supersede QA-20260415-0291 as the current production broad reference because console cleanliness regressed with a repeated production chunk init TypeError and the weather answer leaked a stale absolute date.
